mapper.insert: insert into paymentInfo ( uId, rName, rPhone, rZip, rAddr1, rAddr2, rEmail, totalPrice, totalDeli, totalPay, payDate, createdDate, createdBy, updatedDate, updatedBy ) values ( #{uId}, #{rName}, #{rPhone}, #{rZip}, #{rAddr1}, #{rAddr2}, #{rEmail}, #{totalPrice}, #{totalDeli}, #{totalPay}, now(), current_timestamp, coalesce(#{createdBy}, #{uId}), current_timestamp, coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{uId}) )
mapper.select: select count(*) from cartList where uId = #{uId}
select exists(select 1 from cartList where uId = #{uId} and cNum = #{cNum})
mapper.insert: insert into cartList(uId, cNum, createdDate, createdBy, updatedDate, updatedBy) values (#{uId}, #{cNum}, current_timestamp, #{uId}, current_timestamp, #{uId})
mapper.delete: delete from cartList where uId = #{uId} and cNum = #{cNum}
mapper.select: select c.uId, c.cNum, b.cUid, b.cTitle, b.cPrice, b.cDelivery, b.cMaxStu, b.cApplyStu from cartList c join classBBS b on c.cNum = b.cNum where c.uId = #{uId} order by c.cNum desc
select p.pNum, p.uId, p.cNum, p.cUid, p.cTitle, p.pQty, p.payDate, b.cCategory, b.cPrice, b.cDelivery from payComplete p join classBBS b on p.cNum = b.cNum where p.uId = #{uId} order by p.pNum desc
select p.pNum, p.uId, p.cNum, p.cUid, p.cTitle, p.pQty, p.payDate, i.rEmail from payComplete p join paymentInfo i on p.pNum = i.pNum where p.cUid = #{uId} order by p.pNum desc
